title: RSoft Algerian Kippers Pilaf
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring crispy kippers in a rich and umami pilaf made with shojin-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: preferably Jasmine rice for its mild flavor and excellent texture

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: enough to coat the bottom of a non-stick pan

instructions: Slice kippers in half lengthwise and lightly dust with salt.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, and tomato paste; sauté until onions are translucent.
Add rice and stir for 2-3 minutes to coat it evenly.
Top the rice with kippers. Drizzle lemon juice over everything and mix gently but thoroughly. Cover loosely with foil.
Bake at 200C (400F) for 15 minutes, then remove cover and continue baking until all liquid is absorbed and kippers are crisp and golden, about 10 more minutes.
Garnish with fresh chives before serving. Adjust seasoning if needed.
